compatibilityLabel: React DOM 19.2.6 namespace, SVG, and MathML host output oracle

generation.method: checked runtime inventory plus exact npm tarballs extracted into a temporary node_modules tree
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per probe mode, action, and scenario

probeModes.reason: Development captures observable host output plus React DOM warning channels.
Production captures the minified-runtime host output without development diagnostics.

serverScenarios.description: Server rendering serializes common React SVG attribute names, xlink attributes, and xml attributes.
Server rendering preserves SVG foreignObject with HTML descendants and nested SVG descendants.
Server rendering serializes MathML elements, MathML attributes, and annotation-xml descendants.

clientScenarios.description: Client rendering applies common SVG attributes through setAttribute and namespaced attributes through setAttributeNS.
Client rendering switches from HTML to SVG, back to HTML below foreignObject, then back to SVG for nested svg.
Client rendering derives child namespace context from an SVG root container.
Client rendering creates MathML roots and descendants in the MathML namespace.

intentionalGaps.reason: This oracle records pinned React DOM behavior only; Fast React React DOM rendering behavior is not implemented in this worker scope.

Client probes record React DOM host API calls against a deterministic fake DOM so namespace and attribute decisions are observable without adding jsdom or browser dependencies. They do not claim browser parser, layout, focus, event, or platform API parity.
Hydration, mismatch handling, event delegation, resource hints, controlled forms, style diffing, and update/removal behavior are separate oracle tracks.
